scope: repo blockers plus open roadmap program

issues.summary: Bootstrap and doctor scripts support macOS paths, but the repo has not yet added automated validation for that host class.
Perpetual loop control is exposed through MCP and fleet summaries, but there is not yet a dedicated TUI loop interaction surface.
Loop runs execute deterministic single iterations, but automatic planner retry/requeue and background scheduling remain future work.
Provider normalizers are hardened, but roadmap item 2.5.5.3 for stderr-derived cost fallback remains open.
